cards.name: Qualità dell'aria
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card qualità aria: AQI con zone colorate, classificazione, grafico 24h smooth.
cards.description_en: Air quality card: AQI with colored zones, classification, smooth 24h chart.

cards.name: Climatizzatore
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Controllo completo climatizzatore HA: power, modalità (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), target ±, fan speed, temperatura corrente e umidità. Icona animata e tema colore dinamico per modalità attiva.
cards.description_en: Full HA air conditioner control: power, modes (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), target ±, fan speed, current temperature and humidity. Animated icon and dynamic color theme for active mode.

cards.name: Clock
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Orologio digitale con ticks counter. Dimostra useCardConfig e useStyles.
cards.description_en: Digital clock with tick counter. Demonstrates useCardConfig and useStyles.

cards.name: Light Control
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Controllo luce HA: on/off, luminosità e colore con sezioni disattivabili.
cards.description_en: HA light control: on/off, brightness and color with toggleable sections.

cards.name: Persona
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card persona HA: avatar, zona, batteria, passi/km guidati. Layout split con mappa Google Maps live sul lato destro (sfumatura graduale tra info e mappa), campo dedicato per il device_tracker GPS, badge LIVE animato.
cards.description_en: HA person card: avatar, zone, battery, steps/driven km. Split layout with live Google Maps on the right (gradient between info and map), dedicated GPS device_tracker field, animated LIVE badge.

cards.name: Room Sensor
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card sensore stanza: gauge multipli, flow chart storico, badge numerici, mini-gauge batteria/segnale.
cards.description_en: Room sensor card: multiple gauges, history flow chart, numeric badges, mini battery/signal gauges.

cards.name: Termostato
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Gauge 270° con gradiente blu→arancione per termostato HA. Slider target, toggle on/off, multi-mode.
cards.description_en: 270° gauge with blue→orange gradient for HA thermostat. Target slider, on/off toggle, multi-mode.

cards.name: Tigo Panels
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Monitor real-time ottimizzatori Tigo: griglia celle pulsanti per potenza istantanea di ogni pannello.
cards.description_en: Real-time Tigo optimizer monitor: button grid showing instantaneous power for each panel.

cards.name: Dreame Vacuum
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card Dreame Vacuum con UI ispirata all'app ufficiale: mappa, sheet di pulizia (CleanGenius/Personalizza), base stazione, impostazioni MopExtend™.
cards.description_en: Dreame Vacuum card with app-inspired UI: map, cleaning sheet (CleanGenius/Customize), base station, MopExtend™ settings.

cards.name: Fotovoltaico — Ieri
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Riepilogo produzione/consumo/prelievo/cessione del giorno precedente con grafico orario.
cards.description_en: Previous day production/consumption/grid-draw/export summary with hourly chart.
